metadata.title: Bertoldo Klinger — Software Engineer
metadata.description: Software engineer focused on building scalable web systems and resilient distributed services on AWS. Currently at CarltonOne, remote from Brazil.

hero.name: Bertoldo Klinger
hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.tagline: Building reliable distributed systems and product UIs.

about.heading: Engineer focused on reliability and pace.
about.body: I build scalable web systems and resilient distributed services on AWS — TypeScript, NestJS, Postgres, Redis — with observability (OpenTelemetry, SigNoz) and resilience patterns (circuit breakers, retries) baked in. I leverage modern AI-assisted dev workflows (Cursor, Claude Code, MCP) to ship faster without compromising architectural integrity.
about.highlight: Recent work contributed to a historical NPS of 79.

timeline.heading: Where I've been, where I am.

contact.heading: Let's talk.
contact.body: Best reached by email or LinkedIn. I'm always open to interesting conversations about distributed systems, AWS, and engineering with AI.

blog.title: Writing
blog.description: Notes on engineering, distributed systems, and the craft.
blog.empty: Nothing here yet. Check back soon.
